title: Solar Physical Operator Profile Addendum v1 (APO Extension)
description: Draft v1 addendum schema extending physical-operators.schema.v2.draft.json operator entries with APO-specific fields: skill_affinity, mcp_capabilities, apo_score_weights. compat_mode: missing/unknown fields → warn (never reject). Matches the missing_field_policy='warn' established in physical-operators.schema.v2.draft.json:9.

compat_mode.missing_field_policy_rationale: Operator entries that predate this addendum have no APO fields. Loader must warn (emit log event) but continue. Never reject a valid physical-operators.json entry solely because addendum fields are absent.

description: Addendum fields mixed into a physical operator entry. All fields are optional — missing fields produce warnings, not errors.

items.description: Skill name pattern (exact match or glob with '*'). e.g. 'architecture-writing', 'json-schema*'.

skill_affinity.description: List of Skill name patterns this operator handles well. APO boosts this operator's heuristic score when matched skill is in the list.

items.description: MCP capability token available to this operator.

mcp_capabilities.description: MCP capability tokens available to this operator (pre-provisioned). APO uses this to filter operators that can satisfy a Skill's mcp_tools list without additional provisioning.

latency_weight.description: Weight applied to latency score component. 0=ignore latency, 1=pure latency.

error_rate_weight.description: Weight applied to historical error rate. Higher = penalize high-error operators more.

quota_headroom_weight.description: Weight for available quota headroom. Operators near quota exhaustion score lower.

skill_affinity_weight.description: Bonus weight when operator's skill_affinity matches the dispatched skill.

apo_score_weights.description: Per-dimension heuristic score weights for APO v1 config-driven scoring. Weights are per-operator overrides; APO uses global defaults when absent. Sum of weights need not equal 1.0 — APO normalizes internally.

apo_excluded.description: When true, APO never selects this operator. Used for maintenance or dedicated non-APO operators.

apo_preferred_for.description: Task type strings for which this operator is preferred (boosted rank regardless of heuristic score).

apo_avoid_for.description: Task type strings for which this operator should be avoided (demoted rank).

compat_warning_note.description: When a loader reads an operator entry and any addendum field is absent: emit a WARNING log event (do not raise an error, do not reject the entry). When an unknown addendum field is encountered: emit a WARNING and preserve the field via additionalProperties=true. This policy is inherited from physical-operators.schema.v2.draft.json compat_mode.missing_field_policy='warn'.
